window_summary: This window tracks the recent nektos/act release stream from v0.2.60 through v0.2.89, covering new features, bug fixes, and dependency updates across monthly and patch releases.

chunks.title: v0.2.60
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nektos/act
Release: v0.2.60
Tag: v0.2.60; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-01T02:16:57Z; created_at: 2024-03-01T02:12:58Z
Release notes:
## Changelog
### New Features
* ac6a465 feat: Test writing remote Actions locally (#2155)
* 852959e feat: offline mode for new action cache (#2173)
### Bug fixes
* e1cd7c9 fix: logo and demo asset urls (#2226)
* f2e65e1 fix: Rootless error concerning `/var/run/docker.sock` (#2181)
### Other
* d3c8664 chore: bump VERSION to 0.2.60
* c79f59f build(deps): bump go.etcd.io/bbolt from 1.3.8 to 1.3.9 (#2229)
* 68597d6 build(deps): bump github.com/rhysd/actionlint from 1.6.26 to 1.6.27 (#2228)
* 9e6ce12 build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/image-spec (#2223)
* 5601fb0 refactor: simpilfy go-git cache (#2208)
* 27eb79b build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/image-spec (#2214)
* 8277584 build(deps): bump golang.org/x/term from 0.16.0 to 0.17.0 (#2213)
* 6e80373 Shrink Readme (#2198)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nektos/act release v0.2.60, new features include testing remote Actions locally and an offline mode for the new action cache. Bug fixes address logo and demo asset URLs and a rootless error concerning /var/run/docker.sock. Other changes include dependency updates and a README shrink.

chunks.title: v0.2.61
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nektos/act
Release: v0.2.61
Tag: v0.2.61; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-01T02:20:07Z; created_at: 2024-04-01T02:16:09Z
Release notes:
## Changelog
### Bug fixes
* f825e42 fix: cache adjust restore order of exact key matches (#2267)
* 119ceb8 fix: rootless permission bits (new actions cache) (#2242)
* 75e4ad9 fix: docker buildx cache restore not working (#2236)
### Other
* 361b7e9 chore: bump VERSION to 0.2.61
* d9a19c8 Trivial: reduce log spam. (#2256)
* 3949d74 chore: remove repetitive words (#2259)
* b9382a2 Support overwriting caches (#2265)
* f56dd65 test: use ping to improve network test (#2266)
* 069720a build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker (#2252)
* 8c83d57 build(deps): bump golang.org/x/term from 0.17.0 to 0.18.0 (#2244)
* 352ad41 fix function name in comment (#2240)
* 934b13a build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.8.4 to 1.9.0 (#2235)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nektos/act release v0.2.61, bug fixes adjust cache restore order of exact key matches, fix rootless permission bits for the new actions cache, and resolve docker buildx cache restore not working. Other changes include support for overwriting caches, reduced log spam, and dependency updates.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nektos/act
Release: v0.2.62
Tag: v0.2.62; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-05-01T02:20:12Z; created_at: 2024-05-01T02:16:08Z
Release notes:
## Changelog
### Bug fixes
* 5a9dd3d fix: skipped jobs have no result (#2276)
* 89e3c14 fix: favor command-line over files (#2274)
### Other
* 9885560 chore: bump VERSION to 0.2.62
* 390d94d build(deps): bump megalinter/megalinter from 7.10.0 to 7.11.1 (#2309)
* 53a61fe build(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 4.0.0 to 5.0.0 (#2310)
* 47486a6 build(deps): bump github.com/docker/cli (#2307)
* ac42511 build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker (#2306)
* 992c9d9 build(deps): bump github.com/moby/buildkit from 0.13.1 to 0.13.2 (#2308)
* 213756b build(deps): bump github.com/docker/cli (#2302)
* 843cd94 Add codespell support (config, workflow to detect/not fix) and make it fix few typos (#2296)
* c028aa8 build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker (#2299)
* 1f2e92e build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker (#2295)
* d153616 build(deps): bump megalinter/megalinter from 7.9.0 to 7.10.0 (#2294)
* 2d4a9ea build(deps): bump megalinter/megalinter from 7.8.0 to 7.9.0 (#2216)
* 82cc57f build(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 3.7.0 to 4.0.0 (#2215)
* 7452180 build(deps): bump golang.org/x/term from 0.18.0 to 0.19.0 (#2278)
* c82a9ea build(deps): bump github.com/docker/cli (#2291)
* 8cdc3fc Update action.yml (#2293)
* 2a2cd7d build(deps): bump github.com/moby/buildkit from 0.12.5 to 0.13.1 (#2253)
* 2df924c Bump docker to v26 (#2289)
* ac13a1b chore: fix some comments (#2279)
* 06a1d69 build(deps): bump actions/cache from 3 to 4 (#2163)
* cdc22da Remove local action cache if remote has changed (#2284)
* d2c3413 chore: fix codecov (#2288)
* e3da912 build(deps): bump github.com/go-git/go-git/v5 from 5.11.0 to 5.12.0 (#2269)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nektos/act release v0.2.62, bug fixes handle skipped jobs having no result and favor command-line over files. Other changes include bumping Docker to v26, removing local action cache if remote has changed, adding codespell support, and various dependency updates.

chunks.title: v0.2.65

Repository: nektos/act
Release: v0.2.65
Tag: v0.2.65; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-08-01T02:26:58Z; created_at: 2024-08-01T02:22:10Z
Release notes:
## Changelog
### Bug fixes
* 3c7eda7 fix: docker stub and add a test for this (#2355)
* a1a96da fix: changed location of actrc in info message (#2373)
* 6de25a5 fix: make node tool non volatile (#2372)
* 2ad5ff7 fix: add missing service container health check (#2354)
### Other
* bda491e chore: bump VERSION to 0.2.65
* cd8b710 remove double negation in --help (#2405)
* a62063b Bump mergo to v1.0.0 with new module URL (#2403)
* 2feff3f build(deps): bump github.com/timshannon/bolthold to v0.0.0-20240314194003-30aac6950928 (#2248)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nektos/act release v0.2.65, bug fixes address a docker stub, change the location of actrc in an info message, make the node tool non-volatile, and add missing service container health check. Other changes include removing double negation in --help, bumping mergo, and adding /pre- and /post-entrypoint handling.

chunks.title: v0.2.71
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nektos/act
Release: v0.2.71
Tag: v0.2.71; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-01-01T02:35:48Z; created_at: 2025-01-01T02:30:43Z
Release notes:
## Changelog
### New Features
* fe017a1 feat: Adding in logic to check if act needs to be downloaded (#2575)
### Bug fixes
* deea8ec fix: prevent unintended input replacement in reusable workflows with workflow_dispatch when using workflow_call (#2502)
* b4ef6fb fix: short sha has at least four digits (#2540)
* e6b5062 fix: amd64 arch to X64 (#2580)
### Other
* 0006dee chore: bump VERSION to 0.2.71
* 0ca1e18 Fix typo in `--action-offline-mode` option description (#2590)
* a64359c build(deps): bump github.com/go-git/go-git/v5 from 5.12.0 to 5.13.0 (#2595)
* ccfadfe build(deps): bump github.com/go-git/go-billy/v5 from 5.6.0 to 5.6.1 (#2594)
* c315398 build(deps): bump github.com/rhysd/actionlint from 1.7.4 to 1.7.5 (#2593)
* bd8dda1 ci(mergify): upgrade configuration to current format (#2547)
* 7172fc3 chore: upgrade dependencies (#2589)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nektos/act release v0.2.71, a new feature adds logic to check if act needs to be downloaded. Bug fixes prevent unintended input replacement in reusable workflows with workflow_dispatch when using workflow_call, ensure short sha has at least four digits, and fix amd64 arch to X64. Other changes include a typo fix in --action-offline-mode option description, dependency updates, and a mergify configuration upgrade.

* c956febfe4fae41d6509258ad9454c2c316a51ed add test workflows to cmd pkg (#2665)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nektos/act release v0.2.75, a new feature adds GoGitActionCache shallow fetch. Bug fixes use non-strict schema to allow some undefined behavior, fix remote docker actions new action cache and dry run mode, and fix secret file reading. Other changes include clarifying --no-skip-checkout flag, disabling "unable to get git repo" when none exists, adding tests against reading config files, and dependency updates.

questions.query_text: In the nektos/act releases, which release introduces a cli option to set concurrent jobs count and adds models permission level for AI inference responses?

answer_support.answer_text: new features add a cli option to set concurrent jobs count and add models permission level for AI inference responses

questions.query_text: Across the nektos/act releases, how does the artifact-related change in v0.2.63 differ from the artifact-related change in v0.2.67?

options.text: v0.2.63 introduces an Actions Artifacts v4 backend, while v0.2.67 fixes artifact v4 upload above 8MB.
v0.2.63 fixes artifact v4 upload above 8MB, while v0.2.67 introduces an Actions Artifacts v4 backend.
Both releases only update artifact-related dependencies without functional changes.
v0.2.63 removes artifact support, while v0.2.67 adds it back.

questions.expected_answer: v0.2.63 introduces an Actions Artifacts v4 backend, while v0.2.67 fixes artifact v4 upload above 8MB.

questions.query_text: In the nektos/act release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds support for dereferenced map properties, (2) a release that adds a cli option to set concurrent jobs count, (3) a release that adds --validate and --strict flags, (4) a release that adds GoGitActionCache shallow fetch.

answer_support.answer_text: Added support for dereferenced map properties
add a cli option to set concurrent jobs count
